case_title: ANTHONY FANTANO VS. JAMES M BURROUGHS

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2007 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-19-2007 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN E. MUNTER. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: JIROQUE/DLOK; REPORTER: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782 (206)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BURROUGHS, JAMES M ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
POS RE: ANSWER TO UNLAWFUL DETAINER MAILED TO 395-B FAXON AVENUE, SF., CA 94112 FILED BY DEFENDANT BURROUGHS, JAMES M AS TO PLAINTIFF FANTANO, ANTHONY
MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 505

COURT TRIAL ASSIGNED ON MAR-19-2007 IN DEPT. 505. PARTIES REACH SETTLEMENT: DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $250 BY THE END OF MARCH 20, 2007. IF NOT PAID, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A 3-DAY NOTICE FOR HEARING REQUESTING JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES (395 FAXON AVE. APT. B, SF., CA 94112) AND THE AMOUNT OF $1,900. PLAINTIFF IS TO SUBMIT HIS WRITTEN DECLARATION OR LIVE TESTIMONY. DEFENDANT IS TO MOVE OUT AND PAY $500 BY APRIL 5, 2007. IF THAT IS NOT COMPLIED, PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST THE COURT'S ORDER IN THE SAME WAY AS ABOVE FOR THE BALANCE OF MONEY. IF DEFENDANT MOVES TO A NEW ADDRESS, PLAINTIFF IS TO GIVE A 8-DAY NOTICE TO DEFENDANT. JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (D-505)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FANTANO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT BURROUGHS, JAMES M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
